description: E2E concurrency test: 3 clients submit to the single-GPU service; server processes one at a time (FIFO); client3 polls and pulls its artifacts. Each client passes a client_id (required) and uses the same id (X-Client-Id header) to poll/pull.

client2_bilibili.note: Bilibili. With a logged-in session (scripts/bili_login.py -> data/bili_cookies.txt, auto-used by the worker) this succeeds; from a 412-blocked datacenter IP without cookies it ends 'failed'.

then: client3 polls GET /v1/tasks/{id} with header 'X-Client-Id: client3' until done, then GET /v1/tasks/{id}/artifact (same header) -> zip. /v1/queue is the admin view (all tasks).
